_doc: Slope window per PLATEAU amount. levels[i] applies to PLATEAU = i. Each entry has a `fullTerraceMaxSlope` (slope at or below which terracing applies at full strength) and a `noTerraceMinSlope` (slope at or above which terracing is suppressed); the band in between fades smoothly. `null` means open-ended (no upper bound — used for the cliffs-everywhere setting). Index 0 (PLATEAU OFF) is unused at runtime since the sim short-circuits on amount <= 0, but is included so the array is index-aligned with the bar buttons.
